forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -0,0 +1,44 @@
+---
+assignees:
+- claude-code
+depends_on:
+- 01KS7W1712S865B2Z0TM75BY8A
+- 01KS7W0184W1CZPSC1T78ZV5J3
+position_column: todo
+position_ordinal: 8d80
+project: ai-panel
+title: 'AI panel: ElicitationPrompt component (AI Elements) wired into the conversation'
+---
+#elicitation
+
+## Context / Why
+The panel already renders an inline `PermissionPrompt` from `useConversation`'s `permissionRequest`/`respondPermission` (see `apps/kanban-app/ui/src/components/ai-panel.tsx`, `AiPanelConversation` and the `PermissionPrompt` component). This task adds the sibling `ElicitationPrompt` — a schema-driven form rendered with AI Elements styling — and wires it to the new `elicitationRequest`/`respondElicitation` from the conversation hook. This is the surface the user asked for: "a UI in our agent panel for elicitation ... using our AI elements ... allow user feedback to elicitation responses."
+
+Consumes the pure helpers from the elicitation form-model module (`apps/kanban-app/ui/src/ai/elicitation.ts`): `parseElicitation`, `initialFormState`, `validateForm`, `toAcceptResponse`, `declineResponse`, `cancelResponse`.
+
+## What
+In `apps/kanban-app/ui/src/components/ai-panel.tsx`:
+- [ ] Add an `ElicitationPrompt` component mirroring `PermissionPrompt`'s structure (bordered card, `data-slot="ai-elicitation-prompt"`, `role="group"`, the `message` as the heading). Render with AI Elements look + shadcn `@/components/ui` controls:
+  - text → `Input`; long/textarea → `Textarea`; select (enum) → shadcn `Select`; boolean → `Checkbox`; number/integer → numeric `Input`; multiselect (array) → checkbox group.
+  - required-field markers; show `validateForm` errors on submit.
+  - actions: **Submit** (accept → `toAcceptResponse`), **Decline**, **Cancel**.
+  - URL mode: render the `message` + a link to the url and a Done/Cancel pair (no form fields).
+- [ ] Hold form state with `useState`, seeded by `initialFormState`; reset when the request identity changes.
+- [ ] In `AiPanelConversation`, destructure `elicitationRequest` + `respondElicitation` from `useConversation`, and render `<ElicitationPrompt>` next to the existing `permissionRequest` block inside `ConversationContent`.
+- [ ] Make the prompt's interactive controls reachable by spatial nav consistent with the rest of the panel (follow how `PermissionPrompt`/message actions register; do not invent a new pattern).
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+- [ ] When `elicitationRequest` is set, the form renders one control per schema field with the request `message` shown.
+- [ ] Submit with valid input calls `respondElicitation` with an `accept` response whose `content` matches the typed schema; Decline/Cancel call it with the respective action.
+- [ ] Submitting with a missing required field shows an error and does NOT call `respondElicitation`.
+- [ ] URL-mode requests render the link + Done/Cancel, no form.
+
+## Tests (`apps/kanban-app/ui/src/components/ai-panel.test.tsx`)
+- [ ] Render `AiPanelConversation` (or `ElicitationPrompt` directly) with a stubbed conversation exposing a form `elicitationRequest`; fill fields, submit, assert `respondElicitation` received the correct `accept` payload.
+- [ ] Decline and Cancel paths call `respondElicitation` with the right action.
+- [ ] Missing-required validation blocks submit.
+- [ ] URL-mode renders a link and no form fields.
+- [ ] Run the ai-panel vitest suite — all green.
+
+## Workflow
+- Use `/tdd`. Use `PermissionPrompt` + its test as the structural template.
\ No newline at end of file

-- [ ] Submitting with a missing required field shows an error and does NOT call `respondElicitation`.
-- [ ] URL-mode requests render the link + Done/Cancel, no form.
-
-## Tests (`apps/kanban-app/ui/src/components/ai-panel.test.tsx`)
-- [ ] Render `AiPanelConversation` (or `ElicitationPrompt` directly) with a stubbed conversation exposing a form `elicitationRequest`; fill fields, submit, assert `respondElicitation` received the correct `accept` payload.
-- [ ] Decline and Cancel paths call `respondElicitation` with the right action.
-- [ ] Missing-required validation blocks submit.
-- [ ] URL-mode renders a link and no form fields.
-- [ ] Run the ai-panel vitest suite — all green.
-
-## Workflow
-- Use `/tdd`. Use `PermissionPrompt` + its test as the structural template.
\ No newline at end of file

 #elicitation

 ## Context / Why
-The panel already renders an inline `PermissionPrompt` from `useConversation`'s `permissionRequest`/`respondPermission` (see `apps/kanban-app/ui/src/components/ai-panel.tsx`, `AiPanelConversation` and the `PermissionPrompt` component). This task adds the sibling `ElicitationPrompt` — a schema-driven form rendered with AI Elements styling — and wires it to the new `elicitationRequest`/`respondElicitation` from the conversation hook. This is the surface the user asked for: "a UI in our agent panel for elicitation ... using our AI elements ... allow user feedback to elicitation responses."
+The panel already renders an inline `PermissionPrompt` from `useConversation`'s `permissionRequest`/`respondPermission` (`apps/kanban-app/ui/src/components/ai-panel.tsx`, `AiPanelConversation` + `PermissionPrompt`). This task adds the sibling `ElicitationPrompt` container and wires it to `elicitationRequest`/`respondElicitation` from the conversation hook. The per-field rendering is delegated to the `ElicitationFields` component (sibling task); this task owns the message, validation orchestration, actions, URL mode, form state, and panel wiring. This is the surface the user asked for: "a UI in our agent panel for elicitation ... using our AI elements ... allow user feedback to elicitation responses."

-Consumes the pure helpers from the elicitation form-model module (`apps/kanban-app/ui/src/ai/elicitation.ts`): `parseElicitation`, `initialFormState`, `validateForm`, `toAcceptResponse`, `declineResponse`, `cancelResponse`.
+Uses the pure helpers from `apps/kanban-app/ui/src/ai/elicitation.ts`: `parseElicitation`, `initialFormState`, `validateForm`, `toAcceptResponse`, `declineResponse`, `cancelResponse`; and the `ElicitationFields` control component.

 ## What
 In `apps/kanban-app/ui/src/components/ai-panel.tsx`:
-- [ ] Add an `ElicitationPrompt` component mirroring `PermissionPrompt`'s structure (bordered card, `data-slot="ai-elicitation-prompt"`, `role="group"`, the `message` as the heading). Render with AI Elements look + shadcn `@/components/ui` controls:
-  - text → `Input`; long/textarea → `Textarea`; select (enum) → shadcn `Select`; boolean → `Checkbox`; number/integer → numeric `Input`; multiselect (array) → checkbox group.
-  - required-field markers; show `validateForm` errors on submit.
-  - actions: **Submit** (accept → `toAcceptResponse`), **Decline**, **Cancel**.
-  - URL mode: render the `message` + a link to the url and a Done/Cancel pair (no form fields).
-- [ ] Hold form state with `useState`, seeded by `initialFormState`; reset when the request identity changes.
-- [ ] In `AiPanelConversation`, destructure `elicitationRequest` + `respondElicitation` from `useConversation`, and render `<ElicitationPrompt>` next to the existing `permissionRequest` block inside `ConversationContent`.
-- [ ] Make the prompt's interactive controls reachable by spatial nav consistent with the rest of the panel (follow how `PermissionPrompt`/message actions register; do not invent a new pattern).
+- [ ] Add `ElicitationPrompt` mirroring `PermissionPrompt`'s structure (bordered card, `data-slot="ai-elicitation-prompt"`, `role="group"`, `message` heading). Form mode: render `<ElicitationFields>`; below it, **Submit** (accept → `toAcceptResponse`), **Decline**, **Cancel**. URL mode: render the `message` + link to the url + Done/Cancel (no form).
+- [ ] Hold form state with `useState` seeded by `initialFormState`; reset when the request identity changes; run `validateForm` on submit and block accept (showing errors) when invalid.
+- [ ] In `AiPanelConversation`, destructure `elicitationRequest` + `respondElicitation` and render `<ElicitationPrompt>` beside the existing `permissionRequest` block in `ConversationContent`.
+- [ ] Keep interactive controls reachable by spatial nav consistent with `PermissionPrompt`/message actions (reuse the existing pattern, don't invent one).

 ## Acceptance Criteria
-- [ ] When `elicitationRequest` is set, the form renders one control per schema field with the request `message` shown.
-- [ ] Submit with valid input calls `respondElicitation` with an `accept` response whose `content` matches the typed schema; Decline/Cancel call it with the respective action.
-- [ ] Submitting with a missing required field shows an error and does NOT call `respondElicitation`.
-- [ ] URL-mode requests render the link + Done/Cancel, no form.
+- [ ] When `elicitationRequest` is set, the prompt renders the message + `ElicitationFields` (form mode) or the link (url mode).
+- [ ] Valid submit calls `respondElicitation` with an `accept` response whose `content` matches the typed schema; Decline/Cancel call it with the respective action.
+- [ ] Missing required field shows an error and does NOT call `respondElicitation`.

 ## Tests (`apps/kanban-app/ui/src/components/ai-panel.test.tsx`)
-- [ ] Render `AiPanelConversation` (or `ElicitationPrompt` directly) with a stubbed conversation exposing a form `elicitationRequest`; fill fields, submit, assert `respondElicitation` received the correct `accept` payload.
-- [ ] Decline and Cancel paths call `respondElicitation` with the right action.
+- [ ] Render `AiPanelConversation` (or `ElicitationPrompt`) with a stubbed conversation exposing a form `elicitationRequest`; fill, submit, assert the `accept` payload to `respondElicitation`.
+- [ ] Decline and Cancel paths send the right action.
 - [ ] Missing-required validation blocks submit.
 - [ ] URL-mode renders a link and no form fields.
 - [ ] Run the ai-panel vitest suite — all green.

 ## Workflow
-- Use `/tdd`. Use `PermissionPrompt` + its test as the structural template.
\ No newline at end of file
+- Use `/tdd`. Use `PermissionPrompt` + its test as the structural template; compose `ElicitationFields` for the inputs.
